introSection: Junior Red Force is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Ferrari Land in Salou, Tarragona, Catalonia, Spain. It was manufactured by SBF Visa Group and opened in 2018.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Junior Red Force is an SBF Visa Group Race Coaster, and was built as part of a kids' area for Ferrari Land. It uses a booster wheel lift hill.

fullText:
Junior Red Force is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Ferrari Land in Salou, Tarragona, Catalonia, Spain. It was manufactured by SBF Visa Group and opened in 2018.

Junior Red Force is an SBF Visa Group Race Coaster, and was built as part of a kids' area for Ferrari Land. It uses a booster wheel lift hill.
